name: Lentil Pastitsio
recipeIngredient: 1 jar (30oz.) meatless spaghetti sauce with vegetables
8 ounces mafalda or fettuccine, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan bring water to boiling; add lentils and garlic. Return to boiling; reduce heat.
2. Cover and simmer 10 minutes.
3. Add onion and green pepper. Cover and cook for 5 to 10 more minutes, or until tender.
4. Drain; return to pan.
5. Stir in sauce, cinnamon, and pepper.
6. In a bowl beat egg slightly; stir in Parmesan cheese and parsley.
7. Add pasta; toss to coat.
8. For topping: In a saucepan stir together milk and flour. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
9. Remove from heat. Stir in 1/2 cup of the mozzarella cheese.
10. Beat egg whites until foamy. Fold egg whites into topping.
11. Grease a 3-quart rectangular baking dish.
12. Layer half the lentil mixture, half the pasta mixture, remaining lentil mixture, and remaining pasta mixture.
13. Spoon topping over all.
14. Bake, uncovered, in a 350°F oven about 45 minutes or until hot.
15. Top with remaining cheese and additional cinnamon if desired.
16. Let stand for 10 minutes. Makes 8 servings.
